prompt:
A clean UI-style scene showing a large holographic or glassy screen hovering above a desk, filled with a grid of simple item icons like tools, tokens, and plants, all rendered without legible text. In front of the screen is a small stack of real-world items that match a few of the icons, tying the digital inventory to physical objects. A controller or small handheld device rests on the desk, hinting that the viewer is actively inspecting their collection.

Near-future solarpunk lab or study with soft ambient lighting, pale greens and blues, and subtle greenery in the background. Photorealistic 512×512 look with slightly stylized UI elements, no brand logos, and no faces—only a partial silhouette or hand if any person is shown. The image should immediately suggest "checking your inventory" in a playful but grounded way.
